message:
fix(demo-showcase): add warmup to budget_empty_render to prevent flaky failure (bd-qi0wa)

The first render iteration incurs cold-start overhead (page faults,
cache fills) that inflates the average past the 1ms limit. A single
warmup iteration before timing starts eliminates the variance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
